BoC: Possibility of new US tariffs on Canadian exports to the US has increased uncertainty and clouded economic outlook.
BoC: We will evaluate need for further rate cuts one decision at a time.
BoC Rate Decision Actual 3.25% (Forecast 3.25%, Previous 3.75%)
BoC: Consumer spending and household activity both picked up in Q3, suggesting lower rates are beginning to boost household spending.
Carla Hayden makes history as 1st female Librarian of Congress.

Market analyst reassures about Bitcoin's future amid volatility, cites "biggest liq flush since 2021." Bullish outlook, key indicators point to ongoing growth.
news.summary: Recent volatility in the cryptocurrency market has led to a reevaluation of key indicators, indicating that the current bull run may have significant growth potential. A detailed analysis shared on X suggests that despite experiencing the largest liquidity flush since 2021, the outlook remains bullish. The thread, posted by a crypto analyst, delves into four crucial aspects: on-chain metrics, regulatory developments, macro conditions, and market sentiment. Despite market nervousness, the analyst remains optimistic about the future of the crypto market, stating that "we're nowhere near a top." The full story is available on Benzinga.com.

news.headline: Billionaire Ray Dalio advocates for hard money like gold and Bitcoin over debt assets due to concerns of rising global debt levels, especially in major economies.
news.summary: Ray Dalio, the founder of Bridgewater Associates, has shared his preference for avoiding debt assets due to concerns over high debt levels. The billionaire investor has chosen to allocate his investments towards gold and Bitcoin (CRYPTO: BTC) instead. Dalio expressed worries about the increasing global debt levels, particularly in major economies like the U.S. and China. During his appearance at Abu Dhabi Finance Week, as reported by the South China Morning Post, Dalio emphasized the risks linked to unsustainable debt, which may devalue currencies. He recommended investing in "hard money" assets.

news.headline: Roaring Kitty surpassed Nancy Pelosi's wealth during GameStop frenzy by promoting undervalued GME stock; GME currently at $29.70.
news.summary: Keith Gill, aka Roaring Kitty, gained fame during the GameStop frenzy. His recent cryptic post has reignited interest in the legendary investor who outdid Nancy Pelosi's wealth. Gill initially highlighted GameStop's potential when it was just $5 per share. His detailed analysis and persuasion led to a historic short squeeze in January 2021, pushing the stock to a peak of $483. As of now, GameStop is holding steady at $29.70. Recently, on December 5th, GameStop's stock surged by 14% after Gill's post. His success story is a testament to the power of retail investors in the stock market.

news.headline: Bitcoin ETFs have sparked institutional interest, simplifying crypto investments. Hedge funds are buying BTC through ETFs.
news.summary: The introduction of Bitcoin exchange-traded funds (ETFs) has piqued the interest of institutional investors in digital assets. According to industry experts at the recent Benzinga Future of Digital Assets event, this development signals a shift in the market. Panelists noted that ETFs provide a simplified avenue for investing in cryptocurrency, eliminating the complexities that have previously discouraged traditional investors. Bitcoin ETFs are particularly attractive to financial institutions as they offer a straightforward way to participate in the digital asset market without the need for specialized infrastructure. As highlighted by Robert Leshner, CEO of Superstate, hedge funds are increasingly utilizing ETFs to access Bitcoin, as they encounter challenges in establishing crypto-native infrastructure, digital asset custodians, trading software, accounting, and record-keeping services. This trend underscores the growing appeal of digital assets among mainstream financial entities.

news.headline: Stigg secures $17.5M in Series A funding for software monetization and global expansion.
news.summary: Stigg, the inaugural unified monetization platform for engineers, revealed today that they have secured $17.5 million in Series A funding. The funding will be utilized to support the company's worldwide expansion efforts and enhance its go-to-market operations in New York and Tel Aviv.

news.headline: TruGrid introduces new BESS acceptance strategy and white paper to boost project success. (Characters: 82)
news.summary: On December 11, 2024, in Houston, TruGrid revealed a new approach for accepting battery energy storage systems (BESS) alongside solar projects. TruGrid, an EPC contractor, is recognized for its expertise in utility-scale projects. Their innovative BESS acceptance strategy is detailed in a newly released white paper.

news.headline: Theta Labs exec: AI computing democratized by decentralization. Cost-effective with better flexibility, reliability. - Wes Levitt
news.summary: According to Wes Levitt, head of strategy at Theta Labs, the decentralized cloud provides enhanced cost-efficiency, flexibility, and reliability for AI solutions compared to traditional cloud services.

news.headline: CWTI partners with US water specialists to expand high purity water markets; first system sold in Dec 2024.
news.summary: Based in Guelph, Ontario, on December 11, 2024, Current Water Technologies Inc. is recognized as a global pioneer in pioneering electrochemical solutions for ammonia treatment across various sectors such as aquaculture, municipal, and industrial water treatment. The company, listed on TSX-V under the symbol WATR, has been actively developing cutting-edge technologies for over 18 months. During this period, CWTI partnered with a team of water treatment experts to pinpoint underserved niche markets suitable for the application of its electrochemical innovations geared towards water conservation efforts.

news.headline: Brave Like Me Foundation in Cincinnati debuts 1st Mobile Family Pet Reunion Center for hospitalized children with complex medical conditions, alleviating stress and homesickness.
news.summary: In Cincinnati, Brave Like Me Foundation, a nonprofit aiding families with children having complex medical conditions (CMCs), introduced its Mobile Family Pet Reunion Center. This innovative unit enables hospitalized kids to reconnect with their pets in a secure and cozy setting. Extended hospitalization often leads to emotional distress and homesickness in children, thus being apart from their cherished family pets.

news.headline: Sherweb acquires MicroWarehouse, expanding global presence in Irish cloud market.
news.summary: Sherweb, a renowned cloud distribution company, has recently disclosed its acquisition of MicroWarehouse, a key player in the cloud market in Ireland. This move signifies Sherweb's commitment to expanding its global reach and enhancing its presence in the industry. This development is expected to have a significant impact on the cloud market, as Sherweb continues to solidify its position with this strategic acquisition.

news.headline: The Car Park in Mountain View, California has been chosen for Knightscope's Authorized Partner Program. ($KSCP)
news.summary: Mountain View, California - The company announced that The Car Park has been chosen to participate in the Knightscope Authorized Partner Program. Knightscope, known for its security robots, has selected The Car Park to join the program. This collaboration aims to enhance security measures with the integration of Knightscope technology. The partnership is part of Knightscope's strategic initiative to expand its network of authorized partners.

news.headline: Stocks open higher as Dow climbs by 100 points following release of November's CPI report.
StriVectin® launches TL Peptight™ Face Lift Serum at Ulta on Dec 1, 2024, expanding Tighten & Lift line. #skincare
news.summary: On December 1, 2024, in New York, StriVectin® introduced the latest product in its Tighten & Lift line, the TL Peptight™ Face Lift Serum, a cutting-edge addition to its renowned skincare solutions known for firming. The serum was launched online at Ulta Beauty and marks a significant milestone for the brand as it continues to innovate in the industry. This move showcases StriVectin®'s commitment to providing high-quality products that cater to the growing demand for effective skincare solutions. The TL Peptight™ Face Lift Serum is set to make waves in the market, appealing to consumers seeking advanced and reliable beauty products.

news.headline: Telmai simplifies data quality for AI with open table format integrations and automated PII data detection, enabling acceleration of AI adoption. Update on Dec. 11, 2024.
news.summary: In its most recent product development, Telmai has introduced new features to improve data quality processes, aiding businesses in fast-tracking AI implementation. These updates aim to guarantee data accuracy and adherence to regulations in diverse cloud setups. The announcement was made on December 11, 2024, in San Francisco.

news.headline: Wills Group appoints Thomas Rachubinski as CFO & EVP of Finance & Admin, effective Dec 2, 2024, with over 20 years experience in convenience retail.
news.summary: In La Plata, Maryland, Wills Group, the company behind Dash In convenience stores and Splash In car washes, has appointed Thomas (Tom) Rachubinski as Chief Financial Officer (CFO) and Executive Vice President (EVP) of Finance & Administration, starting from December 2, 2024. With over two decades of financial leadership in the convenience retail sector, Rachubinski joins Wills Group from Wawa. This move marks a significant step for the company, indicating a focus on strengthening financial strategies with Rachubinski's expertise in the industry.

news.headline: FHLBank Pittsburgh provides $8.447 million in grants to combat homelessness in Delaware, Pennsylvania, and West Virginia.
news.summary: In Pittsburgh, a collaboration between FHLBank and housing finance agencies in Delaware, Pennsylvania, and West Virginia has revealed a significant push in the fight against homelessness. They have allocated a total of $8.447 million in Home4Good grants aimed at addressing this pressing issue.

news.headline: Rice Family Foundation distributes grants to 69 nonprofits in Hanover, PA in 2024; supports community initiatives.
news.summary: A foundation based in Hanover, Pennsylvania, named The Rice Family Foundation has recently distributed grant funds to 69 nonprofit organizations as part of its initiatives for 2024. Established in 2017, the Foundation focuses on supporting eligible nonprofits in Hanover and nearby areas that work towards enhancing the community. The foundation is backed by financial commitments and aims to contribute to the betterment of the region through its grants to various organizations.

news.headline: Bollinger Motors partners with Bergey's Truck Centers, expanding their national network to over 50 locations.
news.summary: Bollinger Motors, a well-regarded electric vehicle manufacturer based in OAK PARK, Mich., recently expanded its national dealer network to more than fifty locations by welcoming Bergey's Truck Centers as part of the group. The addition of this respected commercial dealer increases the company's reach and availability throughout the country. This move showcases the company's commitment to providing efficient and sustainable transportation solutions. The announcement was made on Dec. 11, 2024.

news.headline: 84% of CEOs optimistic about company's performance in next 12 months; 42% optimistic post-election.
news.summary: A recent survey, the "2024 Post-Election Fortune/Deloitte CEO Pulse," revealed that 84% of CEOs are optimistic about their company's performance in the next year. Additionally, 42% of CEOs are highly positive about the future. The survey provides insights into the positive outlook of business leaders, highlighting their confidence in the upcoming year.

news.headline: krtrimaIQ Cognitive Solutions wins ICMATS challenge by Indian Govt. - part of 9 missions promoting innovation.
news.summary: In Bangalore, India on December 11, 2024, krtrimaIQ Cognitive Solutions emerged victorious in the ICMATS competition initiated by the Government of India. This esteemed recognition was awarded by the office of the Principal Scientific Adviser (PSA) to the Government of India. The competition was part of the nine missions launched to foster innovation in the country.

news.headline: Celink achieves highest client satisfaction with Net Promoter Score of 74, top in reverse mortgage industry.
news.summary: In Lansing, Michigan, on December 11th, 2024, Celink, a top reverse mortgage subservicer in the country, achieved an impressive Net Promoter Score of "74" from their clients in the latest annual satisfaction survey. This score categorizes their service as "world class." Celink conducts feedback surveys annually from its master servicer to ensure customer satisfaction.

news.headline: eSelf raises $4.5M in seed funding to launch AI conversational agents platform for businesses.
news.summary: A company in Tel Aviv, Israel known as eSelf has revealed the launch of their conversational AI agent platform for businesses. The announcement came with the disclosure of $4.5 million in Seed funding that was secured. Explorer Investments spearheaded the funding round with other investors participating in the investment.

news.headline: Phenom wins 6 awards for GenAI and talent initiatives, including Best Advance in GenAI for Business Impact.
news.summary: Phenom, a company based in Philadelphia, has achieved notable recognition in the field of HR technology. They were awarded a Gold award for their advancements in GenAI technology, specifically for its significant impact on businesses. In addition to this accomplishment, Phenom also received five more awards in various categories related to talent acquisition, development, and retention. This recognition highlights Phenom's excellence in the industry and underscores their commitment to innovation and success.

news.headline: Nexxen and MAGNA report shows audience data boosts CTV creative impact for lower funnel results. Gain insights for personalized relevance.
news.summary: Utilizing audience data goes beyond mere targeting, as it is crucial for gaining valuable insights that help unravel the mystery of relevance for every individual consumer.

news.headline: Spectral Capital Corporation completes acquisition of crwdunit, inc., expanding Quantum as a Service capabilities.
news.summary: Seattle, on December 11, 2024 - Spectral Capital Corporation, a leader in Quantum as a Service (QaaS) computing and decentralized cloud infrastructure, has successfully completed the acquisition of crwdunit, inc., a Delaware corporation. This acquisition is a significant move for Spectral Capital as it expands its scope within the field. Spectral Capital is listed as OTCQB: FCCN and continues to make waves in the industry with this strategic acquisition.

news.headline: Study uses generative chemistry to develop gut-restricted PHD inhibitors in 12 months, generating 115 molecules.
news.summary: The research discusses the process of creating and enhancing new gut-restricted PHD inhibitors with the aid of the advanced generative chemistry tool Chemistry42. This endeavor, from its start to the selection of a preclinical candidate, took merely 12 months. Within this timeframe, around 115 molecules were developed and evaluated for their potential.

news.headline: Non-invasive in-ovo sexing tech introduced in U.S. for the first time, revolutionizing egg industry. Dec. 11, 2024.
news.summary: A revolutionary technology has been introduced in Wilton, Iowa, as of Dec. 11, 2024, allowing for the determination of the sex of a chick in brown layer hatching eggs before hatching. This marks a major advancement for the U.S. egg industry. This development is set to revolutionize operations and enhance efficiencies in the industry.

news.headline: Traders add to ECB rate-cut bets, price -158bps through 2025.
Patra unveils AI services to automate insurance industry, drive revenue growth & profitability for organizations.
news.summary: In El Dorado Hills, California, Patra has introduced a range of document automation services utilizing artificial intelligence (AI). These services are tailored to enhance revenue growth and profitability for insurance companies.

news.headline: New program by Reach Institute aims to tackle rising youth depression cases, impacting 4.1 million individuals aged 12-17.
news.summary: A program rooted in behavior change science integrates practical CBT methods with ongoing guidance to improve mental health care for children. In New York on December 11, 2024, it was reported that youth depression is increasing, impacting around 4.1 million individuals aged 12-17 in the United States. The initiative aims to address this issue by offering comprehensive support for pediatric mental health.

news.headline: Great HealthWorks partners with Elizabeth Gutiérrez, celeb and mother, for OmegaXL Sport; a natural muscle recovery supplement.
news.summary: Today, Great HealthWorks, the company behind OmegaXL Sport, a natural supplement for muscle recovery, revealed their latest collaboration with Elizabeth Gutiérrez, a renowned celebrity, model, and mother. The partnership aims to leverage Gutiérrez's status as a public figure to promote the brand and its products to a broader audience. This development was announced in Fort Lauderdale, Florida on December 11, 2024.OmegaXL Sport is known for its efficacy in aiding muscle recovery, and this partnership indicates Great HealthWorks' commitment to expanding its market reach. The collaboration with Elizabeth Gutiérrez brings a fresh perspective to the brand, considering her influence and busy lifestyle.

news.headline: Synopsys unveils Ultra Ethernet IP enabling up to 1.6 Tbps for 1M endpoints & UALink IP offering high speed.
news.summary: Leading Silicon IP provider meets industry demand for open standard solutions to accommodate the growth of AI accelerator infrastructure. The cutting-edge Synopsys Ultra Ethernet IP solution is poised to deliver a remarkable bandwidth of 1.6 Tbps, facilitating connectivity for up to one million endpoints. Complementing this, the Synopsys UALink IP solution is set to offer an impressive...

news.headline: NeuroSense got FDA approval for Phase 3 study design for PrimeC following successful Phase 2b study; Phase 3 begins mid-2025.
news.summary: Following the Type C meeting with the FDA and the recent release of data from the 18-month Phase 2b PARADIGM study, the company is now scheduled to initiate a Phase 3 study in mid-2025. PrimeC has shown promising results in slowing disease progression and improving survival rates in individuals.
